summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Walker dashboard improvements. All key features implemented and working: 'Current Challenge' labeling, route map visualization with milestones and walker position, SPONSORS renamed to SUPPORTERS throughout app, clipboard copy functionality with fallback, new Supporters page with full functionality, and navigation updates. Dashboard has all 4 required quick action cards.
passed_tests: Login as john@example.com/walker123 - dashboard loads successfully
Dashboard has route map with milestone markers and animated walker position indicator
Dashboard Share Fundraising Page card shows 'Copy your supporter link'
Dashboard has exactly 4 quick action cards: Log Activity, Share Fundraising Page, Your Team, Your Supporters
Share Fundraising Page copy functionality works with success toast
Your Supporters card navigation to /supporters page works
Supporters page shows complete functionality: invite form, fundraising link with copy button, supporter list (3 supporters), invited list (3 invited)
Supporters page copy link button works with success toast
Navigation bar shows Supporters link correctly positioned between Team and Leaderboard
Team page Copy Invite Link button works with success toast
Backend API GET /api/sponsors/user-john returns correct sponsors data (3 sponsors)
Backend API GET /api/supporter-invites works with authentication
'Start Your Next Challenge' button correctly hidden at 39.39% progress (only shows at 100%)
Route map displays milestone markers with proper completion states
Walker position indicator shows current km (39.39 km) with proper animation
Clipboard copy fallback functionality implemented for non-HTTPS contexts
All SPONSORS terminology successfully renamed to SUPPORTERS throughout the application
